{{Infobox group
| name = Council of Architects
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

''See also: [[Council of Architects Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Council]] of [[Architects]] serves as the governing body for the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] and holds authority over the [[Gray Island]]. Composed of individuals with highly specialized talents—such as strategists, alchemists, historians, and readers—the group is distinct from other orders like the [[Masons]] or [[Shepherds]] because its members typically remain on the [[island]] rather than traveling the world to gather knowledge. While the group includes over one hundred members, most deliberate in anonymity from shadowed alcoves to allow for honest expression. A smaller group known as the [[High Council]] consists of three members who sit openly around a white column and act as the primary representatives for the [[Am’haranai]]. The [[Council]] manages the daily operations of the [[Guild]] and handles various contracts, prioritizing results over individual lives. Although they hold significant power, their authority is subject to the Mistress or Master of the Mists, who can supersede them. Historically, the [[Council]] was established following the death of the last [[Soulbound]] to [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]]. Membership is restricted to humans, and while they are considered part of the [[Consultant]] family, they are noted for being the only order on the [[Gray Island]] that does not necessarily have to risk physical danger in the field.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[High Council]] of [[Architects]] is a group within the [[Consultants]] that maintains secret archives. Based in an underground home on [[Gray Island]], the [[Council]] was the body [[Shera]] was intended to meet. While members were perplexed by [[Jyrine]]'s survival, [[Lucan]] expressed a desire to join their ranks. Furthermore, [[Yala]] possesses the ability to speak with the authority of this [[High Council]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The High [[Council of Architects]] is a group [[Shera]] was meant to meet.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Council of Architects]] has a home located underground on [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Council of Architects]] is part of the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Council of Architects]] was perplexed by [[Jyrine]]'s survival.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Council of Architects]] is a group that [[Lucan]] hopes to join.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Yala]] speaks with the authority of the High [[Council of Architects]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Architect]] [[Council]] maintains secret archives.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Led by [[Kerian]], the [[Council]] of [[Architects]] serves as the ruling order for the [[Consultants]]. While this governing body can hold sessions, it is a group that may contain discontented segments and remains a target for [[Lucan]], who seeks to press the organization for change. During their proceedings, the [[High Council]] has questioned [[Shera]] for information and possesses knowledge regarding the containment of [[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]]. Additionally, the [[Council]] is aware that [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] is currently weakening.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Kerian]] is at the top of the [[Council of Architects]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Council of Architects]] is the ruling order of the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Architect]]'s [[Council]] is a group that may include discontent segments.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Council of Architects]] can be in session.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The High [[Council of Architects]] questioned [[Shera]] for information.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Architect]] [[Council]] is a governing body [[Lucan]] wishes to press for change in.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Council of Architects]] is a group that may know how to contain [[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Council of Architects]] knows [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] is weakening.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Originally elected following the death of the last [[Soulbound]] to [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]], the [[High Council]] of [[Architects]] serves as a governing body responsible for the daily maintenance of [[Guild]] affairs. While they are not typically known for taking drastic actions, they advised utilizing a ceasefire opportunity and took steps to accelerate [[Shera]]'s timeline. Although [[Meia]] places her trust in the group, [[Zhen]] seeks to avoid conflict with them, and they remain hostile toward the prospect of raising the [[Regents]]. As a body to which the [[Guild]] defers, they should have been notified regarding the actions of the [[Gardeners]], and any matters involving them would fall under the jurisdiction of the [[Regents]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Council of Architects]] is a body the [[Guild]] defers to.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Council of Architects]] advises taking advantage of a ceasefire opportunity.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Council of Architects]] accelerated [[Shera]]'s timeline.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Council of Architects]] was elected when the last [[Soulbound]] to [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] died.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Council of Architects]] is a group that [[Meia]] trusts.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Zhen]] wishes to avoid trouble with the [[Council of Architects]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] would deal with the [[Council of Architects]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Council of Architects]] is hostile to the idea of raising the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Council of Architects]] is a governing body that should have been informed about the [[Gardeners]]' actions.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Council of Architects]] is responsible for the day-to-day maintenance of [[Guild]] affairs.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Council of Architects]] is not known for drastic action.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
